(2) r~^ ^ ^ R l d l J l U * H o-^MItftsi chl o-^I^M'M, cHl£<HI «—^ \ i »\ lalHI i l U 4U o-iJWiytel chl o-^WlH^, illgollcl 0 ra^i^i o-iiwiow u ^ iHRichiRdi (3) ^. <HI«MM3 <lo-<M /—v N. !<HoHK«H <\<rV V JJ^UIMH MQ^I '(lo-^ [W.^1/12/2009-^TJH-I (OT-IV)] 0 -- 1 of 2 -- [TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY, PART I I , SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (ii)] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the ^September, 2018 S.O (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 435 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government, with the concurrence of the Chief Justice of the Gauhati High Court at Guwahati, hereby designates the following Courts mentioned in column (2) of the Table below as Special Courts for the purposes of providing speedy trial of offences punishable with imprisonment of two years or more under the said Act, namely:- Table S.No. (1) 1. 2. 3. Courts (2) Court of District and Sessions Judge at Kohima Court of District and Sessions Judge at Aizawl West Session Division, Yupia Jurisdiction as Special Courts (3) State of Nagaland. State of Mizoram. State of Arunachal Pradesh. [F.No. 01/12/2009-CL-I (Vol.IV)] r i i l ' S (K.V. R. MURTY) JOINT SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA -- 2 of 2 --
